name: Calculateur Roi
desc: Calculez ROI (%) = ((Net profit - Cost) / Cost) × 100. Exemple: Investment €2,000, return €2,600 = ROI = 30%. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
description: Calculez ROI (%) = ((Net profit - Cost) / Cost) × 100. Exemple: Investment €2,000, return €2,600 = ROI = 30%. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
seo_description: Utilisez le Calculateur Roi gratuit pour des résultats exacts en quelques secondes. Entrez vos mesures, sans inscription.
example_label: Calculating return on investment for €25,investment that generated €38,in returns.
result_context: The roi_pct of {roi_pct}% shows your return percentage. The beneficio_neto of {beneficio_neto} is your absolute profit.
mistakes: Not including all investment costs (fees, taxes, transaction costs)
Confusing Total gain with net profit in ROI calculetion
Not considering the time period over which ROI was achieved
